content.en:
Whew!!!

The Lord of Darkness, the Lord of the Ancient Mountain, and all the other bone transformation realms gathered at the entrance of the rift in the territorial sea boundary rift.

They could see that the entrance to this rift was constantly expanding, and they could even faintly see the territory of the Hunhe River Rift.

"What should I do?"

The Lord of Darkness frowned.

"I don't know, wait for the Lord of the Cave Void to come over!" said the Lord of the Ancient Mountain with a frown.

Soon, the Lord of the Void came.

At this time, the Lord of the Cave Void looked at this crack and sighed deeply: "It's still this day, there's no way, we have to try to stop it!"

"How to stop it?"

A bone metamorphosis asked.

The Lord of the Cave Void said: "It's not okay to resist directly, we can't compete with the entire Hunhe River Boundary Rift, and we can't compete with so many bone transformation realms." At present, there is only one way, and that is to wait for a part of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift to squeeze into the territorial sea Boundary Sea, and all of our bone transformation realms will strike together to cut off the Hunhe River Boundary Sea!"

"How can this be done by cutting the gap between the Hunhe River?"

The other bone transformation realms were shocked.

"It can be done!" the Lord of the Void took out a broken knife, "This is the Ancient Divine Weapon Elder Blade, although it is broken, it can still deliver a blow. Originally, this knife cut through a top boundary rift, a sixth-time bone transformation realm existant, and then that one fell, and this broken weapon fell into my hand. With me as the main and you as the auxiliary, all the power is integrated into this knife, and a single blow will explode, with a seventy percent chance of cutting through the gap in the Hunhe River. "

"Okay, that's it!"

The other bone metamorphoses agreed.

There is no other way for them to do it.

Click! Click! Click!

Little by little, the boundary rift of the Hunhe River extends into the boundary rift of the territorial waters.

And the Lord of the Void has begun to gather their strength to merge into the Elder Blade, and they are accumulating their strength to launch a blow.

"It's not time yet!

The main path of the void.

At least wait for a small part of the Hunhe River Boundary Crack to come in before you can do it, otherwise only a small fragment will have no effect, and the Hunhe River Boundary Crack will continue to squeeze in.

In that case, they will fall short.

Therefore, they must wait until enough Hunhe Boundary Territory is squeezed in before they can attack.

Time passed slowly, and more and more Heavenly Ancestors gathered here.

When they learned about the situation, they fled in fright, not daring to stay here.

......

"Is the Hunhe River Boundary Crack going to be integrated into the territorial sea boundary seam?"

Ye Tian was really shocked when he knew the news.

If they do succeed, it's going to be a problem.

There will definitely be great turmoil in the power structure of the entire territorial sea boundary seam, and there will definitely be many forces destroyed, even the dark sea may not be able to survive.

Ye Tian always paid attention to the situation, if something was wrong, he could only send the Terrans at the boundary of the territorial waters back to the territorial waters of Wanlong.

Relying on the territorial sea advantage of Wanlong's territorial waters, it may also be able to ensure a certain degree of security.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the ancient maneuver to move his body, and soon rushed to the place where the Hunhe River Boundary Crack had landed.

At this time, he saw the Hunhe Boundary Rift that was merging into the territorial sea boundary rift, and he also saw a group of Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"With so many Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, will they be able to stop the Hunhe River Realm Crack from descending?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, part of the territory of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift was integrated into the territorial sea boundary Rift.

Abrupt.

The Lord of the Void, they have struck.

"Slash!"

The Boundary Knife turned into a sword that was enough to slash the Ordinary Bone Transformation Realm, and instantly crossed a long distance, aiming at the crack of the Hunhe River Realm.

The speed of this knife was so fast that even one of the bone-changing realms in the crack of the Hunhe River Realm had no time to react.

The sword light slashed into the rift of the Hunhe River Boundary, severing the sea, land, and void here, and completely splitting it apart.

Some unlucky blood transformation realms were even touched by the sword light, and they instantly turned into ashes.

This knife also killed countless living beings.

Click!

Part of the territory of the Hunhe Boundary Rift was detached, and the magic circles were also cut off.

"Damn !!!"

The Lord of the Ruins was furious.

They didn't expect that the Bone Transformation Realm of the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift would be able to cut through the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, which made their plan fail!

A part of the territory of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift fell into the territorial sea boundary crack, but this part only occupied a small part of the territory, and most of the territory could not continue to integrate into the territorial sea boundary seam, and was directly disconnected.

At this time, the crack continues to heal, and I am afraid that it will soon recover.

"Flee into the !!! of territorial waters"

Some of the bone transformation realms that were close to each other forcibly rushed in, but more bone transformation realms had no chance.

There is no way to escape into the territorial sea boundary rift, they can only find a way to stabilize the Hunhe River boundary rift and prevent the Hunhe River boundary rift from collapsing, otherwise they will all be finished.

And this part of the Hunhe Boundary Rift that fell into the territorial sea boundary crack is still not really integrated into the territorial sea boundary crack at this moment.

Moreover, the entrances to the boundary rift of the Hunhe River and the boundary rift of the territorial sea have disappeared in advance, and if they break into the boundary rift of the territorial sea now, they will definitely be moved and expelled.

Therefore, they did not leave immediately, but only stayed in this small territory in the gap of the Hunhe River Boundary, looking at the Lord of the Void from afar.

"There are still a lot of bone transformation realms that have broken in!"

The main path of the void.

"At least not without the power to resist!" said the Lord of the Ancient Mountain.

"Let's go, they won't be coming out anytime soon, let's go back and think about countermeasures first. "

The Lord of Darkness.

......

The Hunhe River Boundary Rift fell into this part of the territory of the territorial sea boundary rift.

The Lord of the Ruins looked at everything around him and breathed a sigh of relief.

Fortunately, the Chaoxu Sea successfully entered here, after all, the Hunhe River Boundary Rift used this part of the territory of the Chaoxu Sea as the front end to rush into the territorial sea boundary rift, so the entire Chaoxu Sea still came in.

So for him, there is no loss.

However, there are many forces that only a sporadic part of the Heavenly Ancestor and the Bone Transformation Realm have entered here, and they have separated from the forces behind them, which is really a little depressing.

"Lord of the Ruins, look at the good things you do!"

The Ancient Chaos Dragon said in annoyance.

He just came to help, but now he stays here, while his descendants stay in the Chaos Sea, but the Chaos Sea has not entered the territorial sea boundary crack, but stayed in the Hunhe River boundary crack, I don't know what the situation is!

"Everyone, I don't want this kind of thing, but after it is stabilized, let's see if we can contact the rest of the territory of the Hunhe River Boundary Seam!"

The main path of the ruins.

"That's all there is to it!"

The other bone transformation realm nodded.

Subsequently.

They began to build circles to stabilize and consolidate these territories.

In addition to the chaos overseas, there are more than a dozen similar territories that have come in together.

A top overlord-level force like the Chaos Ruins Cave has almost completely entered six this time, and coupled with the existence of the idle Bone Transformation Realm, their strength is still very strong.
